action.description:
Introduced by Senators Spreitzer, Wall, Dassler-Alfheim, Ratcliff, Roys, Smith, Carpenter, Hesselbein, Larson and Wirch; 
cosponsored by Representatives Doyle, Johnson, Arney, Bare, Brown, DeSmidt, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Goodwin, Hysell, Joers, Kirsch, Mayadev, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Palmeri, Prado, Roe, Sheehan, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Spaude, Stubbs, Subeck, Taylor, Andraca, Haywood, Stroud, Tenorio, Udell and Vining
